scripts.build: vite build && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --sourcemap --outfile=dist/_worker.js --external:cloudflare:node --external:cloudflare:workers --external:fs --external:path --external:node:fs --external:node:path --external:node:child_process --external:child_process --external:os --external:node:os --external:stream --external:node:stream --banner:js="import * as nodeModule from 'node:module'; const require = nodeModule.createRequire('/index.js');"
scripts.dev:cf: npm run build && wrangler pages dev ./dist --compatibility-flag=nodejs_compat
